summary: Most Indians underestimate what it takes to retire comfortably. In this episode, Sneha Jain, Founder of Wealth Trust, breaks down the essentials of retirement planning for India. From the right investment strategies to managing inflation and rising healthcare costs, we cover what you really need to know.

chapters.label: Why retirement planning is more important than ever
How do we go about Retirement Planning
How to Calculate Your Retirement Corpus
How Often to Review Your Retirement Plan
What is the Right Return Expectation across investment products

tool.label: Real Retirement
tool.reason: Find the corpus you actually need to retire, and whether your current savings get you there.
